seo.title: Dental Marketing for Greater Boston Practices
seo.description: Local SEO, conversion-first websites, and a 24/7 AI front desk that fills dental and medical practices with new patients across Greater Boston.

sections.heading: Dental marketing that fills your chairs with new patients
sections.subheading: Local SEO + AI websites for Greater Boston practices
sections.intro: AQ Marketing helps dentists and medical practices get found on Google, get chosen over the practice down the street, and get booked. We rank you in the map pack, build a website that turns visits into appointments, and put an AI front desk behind every click — so the after-hours call you'd lose today gets answered and booked instead.

sections.heading: Patients pick the practice they find first
sections.subheading: Local SEO + AI websites, under one roof.

paragraphs.html: When someone needs a dentist or a doctor, they pull out their phone and tap the first few practices in the map pack. If your practice isn't there, you're not in the running — the new patient is already booking with whoever shows up first. Most dental and medical websites are built to look nice, not to get found or get the phone to ring.

We fix both halves of that problem with one team. We rank your practice in Google's local results, then put an AI receptionist and chatbot behind every click — so the after-hours "do you take my insurance?" question gets answered at 9pm, and the patient books instead of calling the office across town.

No middlemen, no finger-pointing between a "web guy" and an "SEO guy." One login, one team, one bill. We've tuned this for Woburn, the North Shore, MetroWest, and Greater Boston practices since 2003. See how it works on our Local SEO and web design pages, browse the full services lineup, or explore the other industries we serve — including law firms and home services.

sections.heading: Everything a busy practice needs to grow
sections.subheading: Pick one piece or the whole front desk.
sections.intro: We handle the work that actually books patients — local rankings, reviews, a website that converts, and 24/7 AI coverage so the calls you're missing now turn into appointments.

cards.title: Local SEO for dentists & doctors
cards.body: We get your practice into Google's top 3 local results for the searches patients actually use — "dentist near me," "emergency dentist," "pediatric dentist Woburn." More visibility in the map pack means more booked chairs.
cards.price_secondary: + SEO accelerator $1,299/mo for blog content & link building

cards.title: Google Business Profile management
cards.body: Your profile is the first thing patients see. We optimize it, keep your hours and services accurate, post regularly, and answer questions — so you look active, trusted, and open.

cards.title: Reputation & review management
cards.body: Practices live and die by their star rating. We help you collect more 5-star reviews from happy patients automatically and respond to the rest — so your reputation does the selling before the first call.

cards.title: Conversion-first practice websites
cards.body: A fast, modern website that loads in a blink, looks great on a phone, and makes booking an appointment obvious. Built to turn visitors into patients — and you own it from day one.

cards.title: AI website chatbot
cards.body: A chatbot on your site that answers "do you take my insurance?", "are you taking new patients?", and "what are your hours?" instantly — then captures the lead so your front desk wakes up to a booked schedule.
cards.price_primary: Included in the $500/mo package (per-minute usage fees apply)

cards.title: AI receptionist (your AI front desk)
cards.body: A 24/7 AI receptionist that picks up every call your team can't — after hours, at lunch, mid-procedure — and books the appointment. Every missed call today is a patient calling the next practice on the list.
cards.price_primary: Included in the $500/mo package (per-minute usage fees apply)

items.q: What does a dental marketing agency actually do?
items.a: A dental marketing agency gets your practice found by patients who are searching right now and turns those searches into booked appointments. At AQ Marketing that means four things under one roof: ranking you in Google's local map pack, optimizing your Google Business Profile, building a fast website that makes booking easy, and adding a 24/7 AI receptionist and chatbot so no patient call goes unanswered.

items.q: How do you get a dental or medical practice to rank on Google?
items.a: We start with a free 20-point local audit that benchmarks your practice against your top 5 local competitors. Then we optimize your Google Business Profile, build local citations, generate more 5-star reviews, publish location- and service-specific content, and tune your site speed. The goal is simple: get your practice into the top 3 local results for the searches your future patients are typing.

items.q: Will this help my practice get more new patients, not just more clicks?
items.a: That's the whole point. Rankings only matter if they turn into appointments, so we pair Local SEO with a conversion-first website and an AI front desk that answers calls and chats around the clock. When a patient searches at 9pm and asks "are you taking new patients?", the AI answers and books them — instead of them calling the practice down the street.

items.q: Do you work with medical practices too, or only dentists?
items.a: Both. The same playbook that fills a dental schedule works for medical, chiropractic, and other local healthcare practices — get found in local search, build trust with reviews, and capture every call and chat with an AI front desk. We've run this across 30+ industries since 2003.

items.q: What's the AI receptionist and why does a practice need one?
items.a: It's a 24/7 AI receptionist that picks up the calls your team can't — after hours, during procedures, over lunch — and books the appointment or captures the lead. Every missed call is a patient calling the next practice on the list. The AI makes sure that patient books with you instead. Learn more on our AI receptionist page.

items.q: How does billing work, and is there a guarantee?
items.a: Most practices start with our Smart Website & Marketing Package at $500/month on a 12-month agreement, so we have the runway to rank you and compound results. We earn your business by performing, month after month — and you own everything: your website, domain, Google Business Profile, and data, from day one. You'll see measurable progress, fast.

items.q: Do you only work with practices in Boston?
items.a: We're based in Woburn, MA and focus on Greater Boston — Woburn, the North Shore, MetroWest, and the surrounding metro. We take on Massachusetts-adjacent practices case-by-case; if you're outside the Northeast, we'll likely point you to someone better suited.

Most practices start with our Smart Website & Marketing Package at $500/month (a 12-month agreement), which covers your website, Google Business Profile, citations, reviews, AI receptionist, and chatbot. In more competitive areas we add the SEO accelerator at $1,299/month for ongoing content and link building. You own everything we build. The best starting point is our free 20-point audit — we'll benchmark you against your top 5 competitors and recommend the right mix.

sections.heading: Ready to fill your schedule with new patients?
sections.subheading: No pitch. Just a clear plan.
sections.body: Get a free 20-point local audit of your practice. We'll benchmark you against your top 5 local competitors, find where you're losing patients to the map pack, and map the highest-ROI moves to fix it — written up and yours to keep, no obligation. One team, one roof, since 2003.
sections.footnote: Free 20-point audit · You own everything · Rated 5.0 on Google
